text: CDBG -, 1 = Community Development Block Grant. CFR -, 1 = Code of Federal Regulations. CPR -, 1 = Certified Payroll Report. CWHSSA-, 1 = Contract Work Hours and Safety Standards Act. DBA-, 1 = Davis-Bacon Act. DBRA-, 1 = Davis-Bacon and Related Acts. DOL -, 1 = Department of Labor. FHA -, 1 = Federal Housing Administration. FLSA -, 1 = Fair Labor Standards Act. HUD -, 1 = Housing and Urban Development (Department of). IHA -, 1 = Indian Housing Authority. LCA -, 1 = Local Contracting Agency. LDP -, 1 = Limited Denial of Participation. O/T -, 1 = Overtime. PHA-, 1 = Public Housing Agency. S/T -, 1 = Straight-time. SAC -, 1 = State Apprenticeship Council/Agency. TDHE -, 1 = Tribally-Designated Housing Entity. § -, 1 = Section. ¶ -, 1 = Paragraph
